creator: lindens09.grouses@icloud.com
text:
System is a CWWK N6005 Appliance with i226 NICs running OPNsense.

root@opnframe:~ # uname -a
FreeBSD opnframe.removed 13.2-RELEASE-p10 FreeBSD 13.2-RELEASE-p10 stable/24.1-n254984-f7b006edfa8 SMP amd64
root@opnframe:~ #

execution of sysctl -A causes a instant reboot. 
sysctl -a works.

output until crash:
